functions.name: SortByMetaData
functions.description: Sorts the assets based on their meta data's type.

functions.name: SetMetadataTag
functions.description: Set the value associated with a given tag of a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: SetDirtyFlag
functions.description: Set the package dirty flag for an asset

functions.name: SaveLoadedAssets
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in. All objects that live in the packages will be saved. Will try to checkout the files.

functions.name: SaveLoadedAsset
functions.description: Save the package the asset lives in. All objects that live in the package will be saved. Will try to checkout the file.

functions.name: SaveDirectory
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in inside the directory. All objects that are in the directory will be saved.

functions.name: SaveAsset
functions.description: Save the packages the assets live in. All objects that live in the package will be saved.

functions.name: RenameLoadedAsset
functions.description: Rename an asset that is already loaded. Equivalent to a Move operation.

functions.name: RenameDirectory
functions.description: Rename a directory. Equivalent to a Move operation moving all contained assets.

functions.name: RenameAsset
functions.description: Rename an asset. Equivalent to a Move operation.

functions.name: RemoveOnExtractAssetFromFile
functions.description: Call this to remove a callback added with AddOnExtractAssetFromFile.

functions.name: RemoveMetadataTag
functions.description: Remove the given tag from a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: OnExtractAssetFromFileDynamic__DelegateSignature
functions.description: Dynamic version of FOnExtractAssetFromFile.

functions.name: MakeDirectory
functions.description: Create a directory on disk.

functions.name: LoadBlueprintClass
functions.description: Load a Blueprint asset and return its generated class. It will verify if the object is already loaded and only load it if it's necessary.

functions.name: LoadAsset
functions.description: Load an asset. It will verify if the object is already loaded and only load it if it's necessary.

functions.name: ListAssetsByTagValue
functions.description: Return the list of all the assets that have the pair of Tag/Value.

functions.name: ListAssets
functions.description: Return the list of all the assets found in the DirectoryPath.

functions.name: GetTagValues
functions.description: Gets all TagValues (from Asset Registry) associated with an (unloaded) asset as strings value.

functions.name: GetPathNameForLoadedAsset
functions.description: Return a valid AssetPath for a loaded asset.

functions.name: GetMetadataTagValues
functions.description: Get all tags/values of a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: GetMetadataTag
functions.description: Get the value associated with the given tag of a loaded asset's metadata.

functions.name: GetLoadedAssetFilenameLengthForCooking
functions.description: Returns the length of the computed cooked package name and path

functions.name: GetAssetFilenameLengthForCooking
functions.description: Returns the length of the computed cooked package name and path

functions.name: GetAllAssetsByMetaDataTags
functions.description: Gets all assets which have the given tags.

functions.name: FindPackageReferencersForAsset
functions.description: Find Package Referencers for an asset. Only Soft and Hard dependencies will be looked for.

functions.name: FindAssetData
functions.description: Return the AssetData for the Asset that can then be used with AssetRegistryHelpers.

functions.name: DuplicateLoadedAsset
functions.description: Duplicate an asset that is already loaded. Will try to checkout the file.

functions.name: DuplicateDirectory
functions.description: Duplicate a directory and the assets in it.

functions.name: DuplicateAsset
functions.description: Duplicate an asset. Will try to checkout the file. The Asset will be loaded before being duplicated.

functions.name: DoesDirectoryExist
functions.description: Check if a directory exists.

functions.name: DoesDirectoryContainAssets
functions.description: Check if a directory contains any assets.

functions.name: DoesAssetExist
functions.description: Check if an asset exists in the Asset Registry.

functions.name: DoAssetsExist
functions.description: Check if assets exist in the Asset Registry.

functions.name: DeleteLoadedAssets
functions.description: Delete assets that are already loaded.

functions.name: DeleteLoadedAsset
functions.description: Delete an asset that is already loaded.

functions.name: DeleteDirectory
functions.description: Delete the packages inside a directory. If the directory is then empty, delete the directory.

functions.name: DeleteAsset
functions.description: Delete the package an asset is in. All objects in the package will be deleted.

functions.name: ConsolidateAssets
functions.description: Consolidates assets by replacing all references/uses of the provided AssetsToConsolidate with references to AssetToConsolidateTo.

functions.name: CheckoutLoadedAssets
functions.description: Checkout the assets.

functions.name: CheckoutLoadedAsset
functions.description: Checkout the asset corresponding to an object.

functions.name: CheckoutDirectory
functions.description: Checkout all assets in a directory. It will load the assets if needed.

functions.name: CheckoutAsset
functions.description: Checkout an asset.

functions.name: AddOnExtractAssetFromFile
functions.description: Call this to add a callback to extract an asset from a file,
